global_negative: vocals, lyrics, singing, upbeat pop, EDM drop, heavy metal, bright cheerful, cartoon comedy, European fantasy brass, copyrighted melody

categories.zone: Field loop BGM — village, caves, palace, combat
categories.boss_cinematic: Boss intro movie hero scores (SC-09, SC-14, SC-15)

bgm_menu.prompt: melancholy Japanese coastal JRPG title theme, solo koto and sparse synth pad, distant ocean waves, slow 72 BPM, instrumental, no vocals, still and fateful, NieR restraint, seamless loop

bgm_prologue.prompt: cinematic opening movie score, dark Urashima folklore, kappa turtle rescue myth, low strings and distant wordless choir pad, single temple bell, mythic and fateful 60 BPM, instrumental hero theme, no vocals, fade ending not loop

cine_opening_hero.prompt: epic cinematic opening movie hero score, Japanese coastal folklore, palace silhouette gift of lacquer box, emotional swell then ominous turn, orchestral strings shamisen accents, 60 BPM, instrumental only, no vocals, film intro not loop

bgm_village.prompt: ruined coastal village field theme, empty dread and wind, shakuhachi lead low cello drone, muted grey sky, Japanese decay not bright, 66 BPM instrumental loop seamless

bgm_caves.prompt: tidal cave exploration, wonder and unease, bioluminescent water bells synth pad, dripping cavern atmosphere, 78 BPM instrumental seamless loop, no vocals

bgm_palace.prompt: sterile beautiful dragon palace gate, ethereal harp and choir pad unsettling perfect fifth, coral gold void sky, ryūgū palace not European castle, 84 BPM instrumental loop

bgm_combat.prompt: JRPG battle theme mid tension, light taiko and strings, restrained not heroic anime, 108 BPM instrumental combat loop seamless

bgm_boss.scene: Shore Wraith, Palace Sentinel phase 1, Tide Keeper phase 1
bgm_boss.prompt: boss battle hero theme, dark coastal JRPG, full taiko ensemble low brass stabs, escalating dread not triumphant, 132 BPM instrumental loop seamless

bgm_boss_tide_keeper_p2.prompt: boss phase two tidal surge, faster 144 BPM, water percussion and choir hits, ominous rising energy, instrumental loop seamless

bgm_boss_tide_keeper_p3.prompt: boss final phase tragic stillness, ebb and mercy, sparse piano and shakuhachi, 72 BPM emotional instrumental loop, space for silence

cine_boss_wraith_intro.prompt: cinematic boss intro sting, drowned spirit rises from pool, water surge and choir stab, horror coastal folklore, 5 to 8 seconds hero hit instrumental no vocals

cine_boss_sentinel_intro.prompt: cinematic boss intro, lacquer armored sentinel footsteps in void hall, metallic march and eye slit glow, 3 to 5 seconds instrumental sting no vocals

cine_boss_tide_keeper_intro.prompt: cinematic final boss intro hero score, tide keeper materializes from void sea throne, wide orchestral swell and clock tick undertone, tragic ruler 6 to 10 seconds instrumental

bgm_ending_rewind.prompt: ending movie hero score bittersweet festival, village restored time lapse, shamisen and crowd ambience swell, emotional rewind fate, 96 BPM instrumental no loop fade out

cine_ending_rewind_hero.prompt: full ending cinematic hero orchestral score, festival crowd crane up figure dissolves, bittersweet triumph and loss, Japanese coastal folk instruments with strings, film ending not loop

bgm_ending_anchor.prompt: ending movie dawn hope, box shatters spirit light scatters, soft piano and koto sapling planting, gentle rebuild 80 BPM instrumental fade ending

cine_ending_anchor_hero.prompt: ending cinematic hero score anchor ending, dawn shore rebuild small figures planting tree, warm restrained hope not Disney, orchestral koto blend instrumental film outro

bgm_ending_drift.prompt: ending movie open tragedy, solo shakuhachi endless sea boat rows away, underwater palace glimmer, 54 BPM sparse instrumental fade to surf only no loop

cine_ending_drift_hero.prompt: final ending cinematic hero score tragic drift, Urashima rows into void sea palace below, emotional orchestral shakuhachi waves, slow 54 BPM film ending instrumental

sting_boss_intro.prompt: short boss intro sting hit, taiko and low brass stab, 1.2 seconds impactful instrumental

sting_combat_start.prompt: JRPG combat start sting, quick ink-wash whoosh and drum hit, 0.8 seconds instrumental

sting_yuzu_join.prompt: spirit ally join sting, soft fox bell and cyan chime, short not triumphant, 2 seconds instrumental

sting_choice_silence.prompt: dramatic choice moment near silence, single low bell and breath pad, tense stillness 3 seconds instrumental
